title: Dashboard (sample)
body: A single view of cash + spending signals using deterministic watch data (no bank connections).

title: Expenses (read-only)
body: Explore categorized expenses in watch mode. The interactive demo lets you add/edit inside a sandbox session.

title: Expense detail (preview)
body: A full detail/edit screen layout, shown as preview only. No destructive actions are executed.

title: Budgets (month-aware)
body: Budget limits and utilization computed from seeded watch expenses for the selected month.

title: Budget detail (preview)
body: Edit form layout for a single month+category budget. Save/Delete are disabled in watch mode.

title: Insights (deterministic)
body: Spend forecast + anomaly-like detections derived from watch sandbox data (no API keys).

title: Recommendations (deterministic)
body: Run-like analysis with explainers. In watch mode this is preview-only; the interactive demo performs the run.

title: Investments (sample)
body: Static holdings preview. No live quotes are requested in this sandbox.
